title: distillationColumn operation
description: Operation block of a distillation column with constant molar overflow.  Feed enters at feedStage; condenser is stage 0, reboiler is stage nStages+1.  Solved by the sequential bubble-point (Wang-Henke, default) or the rigorous simultaneous MESH Newton (stable on azeotropes).

nStages.title: Internal stages
nStages.description: Number of equilibrium stages between condenser and reboiler (exclusive).  Total stages = nStages + 2.

feedStage.title: Feed stage
feedStage.description: 1-indexed stage where the feed enters (1 = top tray below condenser).  Must satisfy 1 <= feedStage <= nStages.

refluxRatio.title: Reflux ratio
refluxRatio.description: L / D, the ratio of liquid returned to the column over distillate withdrawn.

P.title: Operating pressure
P.description: Column pressure (assumed constant across all stages).  Falls back to the feed-stream pressure if omitted.

feedQuality.title: Feed quality q
feedQuality.description: Convention q = 1 saturated liquid, q = 0 saturated vapor.  Defaults to 1 (saturated-liquid feed).
